engine_name.description: Specifies the database engine type. This value is required and must match a valid engine name supported by the provider.

major_engine_version.description: Defines the major version of the database engine to use. Must match a supported version for the specified engine.

name.description: Optional name for the resource. If not specified, a unique name will be generated.

name_prefix.description: Optional prefix to prepend to the resource name. Useful for creating unique resource names while maintaining a consistent naming convention.

option.description: Defines a list of options to apply to the resource, including settings for security groups, ports, versions, and option-specific configurations.
option.type: list(object({db_security_group_memberships: optional(list(string)),option_name: string,port: optional(number),version: optional(string),vpc_security_group_memberships: optional(list(string)),option_settings: list(object({name: string,value: string}))}))

option_group_description.description: Optional description for the option group to provide context or details about its purpose.

skip_destroy.description: When true, prevents the resource from being destroyed on deletion. Useful for protecting critical resources.

tags.description: A map of key-value pairs to assign custom metadata to the resource. Useful for organizing and identifying resources.

timeouts.description: Defines custom timeouts for operations, such as deletion, to override default timeout settings.
